description: Create generate_mdwa_excel.py that produces Kalkulator_MDWA.xlsx with 7 professional sheets for MDWA Plan A, B, C product presentation. Delete unrelated Chinese-language files (generate_lemon_premium.py and 保费费率表.xlsx).
steps: Delete /projects/sandbox/kirodev/保费费率表.xlsx (Chinese premium rate table output - unrelated)

Create /projects/sandbox/kirodev/generate_mdwa_excel.py using ONLY Python standard library (zipfile, xml strings - same raw XML approach as generate_excel.py). DO NOT use openpyxl as it is not available.

The script must generate Kalkulator_MDWA.xlsx with these 7 sheets: 1) Overview - product summary comparing all 3 plans, 2) Plan A - Anuitas - benefit tables with Banding 1 & 2, 3) Plan B - Beasiswa - benefit tables with Banding 1 & 2, 4) Plan C - Combo - benefit tables with Banding 1 & 2, 5) Simulasi - calculator/simulation sheet, 6) Komisi - commission structure, 7) Perbandingan - comparison vs competitors
Use professional formatting: Manulife green (#00B050 or #1E7145), merged cells for headers, clear section titles, number formatting
All text must be in Indonesian (with standard English insurance terms where appropriate). NO Chinese characters anywhere.
Include all MDWA product data provided in the task description (benefits, banding, commission rates, competitor comparison)
The Simulasi sheet should allow agents to see projected benefits based on different premium amounts for each plan
Run the script to generate the output xlsx file
acceptance_criteria: generate_mdwa_excel.py exists and runs without errors using only standard library
Kalkulator_MDWA.xlsx is generated with exactly 7 sheets
All content is in Indonesian/English - no Chinese characters
The xlsx file is a valid zip/xlsx that can be opened
All MDWA Plan A, B, C benefit data is included correctly
Commission structure is complete for all plans
verification: python3 -c "import zipfile; z=zipfile.ZipFile('Kalkulator_MDWA.xlsx'); print(z.namelist()); z.close()" (should show valid xlsx structure)

python3 -c "import zipfile; z=zipfile.ZipFile('Kalkulator_MDWA.xlsx'); content=z.read('xl/sharedStrings.xml').decode(); assert '\u4e2d' not in content; print('No Chinese chars found - OK')" (verify no Chinese)
findings: Script generates valid xlsx with 14 internal files and 7 sheets. No Chinese characters present. All verification checks pass. Used raw XML + zipfile approach (no openpyxl needed). Deleted generate_lemon_premium.py and the Chinese xlsx file. REDESIGNED: Added interactive KALKULATOR sheet as first sheet with 6 data validation dropdowns (Gender, Plan, Currency, Payment Term, Coverage, Mode) and 21 Excel formulas (IF, INDEX/MATCH) that auto-calculate eligibility, banding, benefit percentages, nominal amounts, ADB/TPD, and payment mode conversions. Data sheets (DATA_PLAN_A/B/C) contain structured lookup tables with benefit data for all plans/terms/coverage combinations.
